mapper.select: SELECT * FROM categories ORDER BY name
SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books WHERE categoryId = c.id) as booksCount FROM categories c ORDER BY c.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories(name, `desc`, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{name}, #{desc}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET name=#{name}, `desc`=#{desc}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books WHERE categoryId = #{categoryId}
